title: Bibble Bobble Boom
poem_text:
Tizzle tick the blip blop sky,
Wiggle wack the jiggly pie.
Fizzle pop the snick snack tree,
Dibble dob the bumble bee.
Zizzle zap the fluffernut,
Giggle glop the wobble shut.
Pipple plop the dreamy doze,
Whisper low the sleepy toes.
cover_context: A swirling night sky filled with glowing blips and jiggly pies floating among stars, while a tiny bumble bee dozes on a fluffernut cloud.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, acoustic guitar and finger snaps, 111 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
